EmailTemplate.name: AES - New Compliance Requirement
EmailTemplate.subject: We need a few more documents to support your application
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
WE NEED A FEW MORE DOCUMENTS.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
in order to proceed your recent contract application, we need a few more documents from you.
Please head over to the portal to get started!
OPEN THE ALLIANCE PORTAL
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
